title: Bāghpat heat wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Bāghpat with a Z-Score of +4.86. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Bāghpat is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 16.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 28%, and the wind speed is 7.4 km/h, which is not providing any significant relief from the heat. 
 The lack of precipitation and high temperatures are leading to severe heat-related stress, with a critical level of impact on the city's infrastructure and daily life.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
